allow: Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root madness_local -e "SELECT u.id, uc.email, u.status FROM users u JOIN user_credentials uc ON u.id = uc.user_id LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u root madness_local -e "SELECT u.id, uc.email, u.status FROM users u JOIN user_credentials uc ON u.id = uc.user_id LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e "SELECT u.id, uc.email, u.status FROM users u JOIN user_credentials uc ON u.id = uc.user_id LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e "SELECT id, user_id, headline_text, headline_level, LEFT\(body, 80\) as body_preview, created_at FROM posts;")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e "SELECT id, user_id, headline_text, headline_level, created_at FROM posts ORDER BY id;")
